stemHtml: Which option is correct as regards the effect of meteorological conditions on the obstacle limited Take-Off Mass?

options.a: increases with a high atmospheric pressure due to the greater thrust available.
options.b: decreases with a headwind due to the greater air resistance.
options.c: increases with a high outside air temperature due to upward air currents.
options.d: decreases with a contaminated runway due to the greater wheel drag.
